title: Original Book Recipe
description: This simple Data Pack adds in a recipe that allows you to make books the legacy way.
body:
# Original Book Recipe

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

The recipe was changed with the Release 1.3.1 update.

With 3 pieces of paper stacked on top of each other to make a column will give you a book. 

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.13-1.20

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68a14b6dfb414a7f2599c49ecd03377c270b0cfe.png)
